context: Tests whether the agent produces the complete asset specs section with the correct image format names, pixel dimensions, and all required image direction fields. The skill specifies three exact image sizes with precise pixel dimensions and five required image direction fields.

checklist.name: 1:1 format with 1080×1080 pixels
checklist.description: Asset specs lists a 1:1 (square) image format and specifies the pixel dimensions as 1080×1080

checklist.name: 9:16 format with 1080×1920 pixels
checklist.description: Asset specs lists a 9:16 (portrait/vertical) image format and specifies 1080×1920 pixels

checklist.name: 4:5 format with 1080×1350 pixels
checklist.description: Asset specs lists a 4:5 image format and specifies 1080×1350 pixels

checklist.name: Image direction — Subject
checklist.description: Image direction subsection includes a Subject field describing what should be in the frame

checklist.name: Image direction — Mood
checklist.description: Image direction subsection includes a Mood field with one or two descriptive adjectives

checklist.name: Image direction — Color
checklist.description: Image direction subsection includes a Color field referencing brand palette or specific color guidance

checklist.name: Image direction — Type treatment
checklist.description: Image direction subsection includes a Type treatment field (even if value is 'none' or specifies text overlay)

checklist.name: Image direction — What to avoid
checklist.description: Image direction subsection includes a 'What to avoid' field listing at least one item to exclude from assets

checklist.name: Format labels match naming convention
checklist.description: All three image formats use aspect-ratio labels (1:1, 9:16, 4:5) rather than just descriptive names (square, vertical, portrait) — aspect ratio labels are required

checklist.name: Output file saved
checklist.description: Brief is saved to briefs/homescent-q2.md or equivalent vault path

checklist.name: All three image purposes noted
checklist.description: The three image formats note their placement purpose: 1:1 = feed primary, 9:16 = Stories/Reels, 4:5 = feed alt/mobile-optimized
